textByHash.81a4ebd866579a9559fde0d804142b4ce5b056d2: Here he is, the hero of the hour. On behalf of the Council, and indeed all of Kourend, thank you for dealing with this messy situation.
textByHash.daf2c67ee1ccb5926cc5a6000dba68c2c910adce: You're far too humble. You've done so much for our kingdom in your short time here. Rest assured, we have noticed. In fact, I consider you a firm friend of the Council.
textByHash.00a5b97bf3e8e0fbb4cab1b34a5100654eb51dcb: Not yet. You need not worry though, we'll get to the bottom of it. That said, I do have another ask of you... if you don't mind.
textByHash.6e03bc8c130b09193db3ed2986f60dca4381b870: Commander Fullore tells me you've had dealings with Martin Holt and his group.
textByHash.5118b9134e935c476b2ef65fd19d3cb0787a4b05: Well regardless, your handling of the situation with Sophia Hughes seems to have had quite an impact on them.
textByHash.bda29aa78f82dfbcd04b7b3c37deb8d23cb30e9a: This recent situation has been most unfortunate. People are angry, I understand that. That said, Sophia Hughes has been dealt with. It's time for Martin Holt and his protestors to go home.
textByHash.9f2c57f451c84b927c33248da59ecb30d6ee7e0e: It would be greatly appreciated. Civil unrest is of no benefit to anyone. We'd all be better off putting this behind us.
textByHash.d1099ae923458b0134d739d5d64e7851f7470146: Now, I must be off. Plenty of work to do. Good luck with Martin and his friends.
textByHash.0ac874ae06a672757539f633123755e94449db5f: Ah, Lord Shayzien. It's good to have you here. Hopefully with your support we can get this protest under control.
textByHash.8aa7be5dc01c8fffe166418dedf65ac25f282258: Though I must say, I'm a bit confused as to why everyone else is here. Is something happening?
textByHash.f92951007181d7a3b7c90072dc312aeb17324099: Trial? Have you gone mad? Trial for what?
textByHash.6962422c0a7f03d152befce87a7b97ef4a4871a4: This is insanity! Guards! Arrest them at once!
textByHash.619b39787791f0a36b4b705e63f10a335cba5a79: Over? Only I decide when it's over! I am the rightful ruler of this kingdom and you all answer to me!
textByHash.fa7af20bc8fe01251c434330ae7141413d90068f: Stay away from me! This is my throne! I worked too hard for you to just take it away! I'd rather die!
textByHash.0809e885383e8e2fe7257861a34ae5f68053eba9: A death? Well that doesn't seem right. The people of Arceuus don't just die. They can't.
textByHash.9e790ee7e75cc33d75400c1670bcdd6f8cc2c86e: Well I don't really know what we can do. The Arceuus family have chosen to keep their knowledge secret from the rest of us. We have no expertise in this area.
textByHash.4fec78653f7e2c804a773120b6b4f037d1b3676c: If I could do something, I would. However, I'm afraid this is out of our hands.
textByHash.664ad52436f5f3de9a60100012e5fec802d4a37f: I'm sorry, but as I already told you, we can't help.
textByHash.8b83b8ab169ace421ddb2d2381934ce10a232c1e: My name is David Andrews. I'm the Head Councillor of the Kourend Council.
textByHash.87ec39a7b3c3ea45b46095f2f6a83c733d9d9708: Kourend's last King, Kharedst IV, had only one child when he died. She was too young to take the throne, so the Kourend Council was formed to look after things until she came of age.
textByHash.0e8c26a2ca98774b524f3fd287e1e92cb28c2442: Alas, she was very close to her father and his sudden death drove her to insanity. With no suitable ruler, the Kourend Council was made permanent.
textByHash.4cc8252ce573853a7a108996e81d7703d6677f3b: The Kourend Council is made up of four councillors. Every four years there is an election for the people to decide who the councillors should be.
textByHash.39512f53b81268c833437dc8abe028f4bb33dcce: One of the councillors holds the position of Head Councillor and this rotates every year. I am the current Head Councillor.
textByHash.a58a8557717bbd17178325cb0b683b8d5a1298f3: The other councillors are Councillor Hughes, Councillor Unkar and Councillor Orson.
textByHash.9ce4f9e1d12a4a190eb416d62649b3dc3f90b4f7: The other councillors are Councillor Unkar and Councillor Orson. The fourth seat on the Council is currently vacent after the recent arrest of Councillor Hughes.
textByHash.673ccdea4074cf947737000c6e50bb6c8e998d42: The five houses of Kourend each have their own leader who rules over their city. The leaders of the individual houses must enforce and obey the laws set out by the Kourend Council, but can otherwise rule as they see fit.
